meta.description: Execution validation fixtures for Track 3. Maps question IDs to fixture directories and validation types.
meta.note: This file is separate from benchmark_data.json to preserve the question dataset as a frozen artifact.

T01.exec_setup_note: data.csv is the input; command should sort by second comma-delimited field

T02.exec_setup_note: conf/ dir with 2 old + 1 new .conf; setup_timestamps.sh sets old mtimes; find . -name '*.conf' -mtime -1 returns new_web.conf

T03.exec_setup_note: setup/input.txt contains 'foo'; correct POSIX answer is redirect+mv (sed 's/foo/bar/g' input.txt > tmp && mv tmp input.txt). Note: sed -i is non-POSIX but also passes file_state validation -- known false-positive for Phase 1

T04.exec_setup_note: Fixture has passwd file with colon-delimited fields; cut -d: -f3 passwd extracts UIDs (0, 1, 2, 65534, 1000)

T05.exec_setup_note: logfile.txt has 8 lines with 4 distinct; sort logfile.txt | uniq | wc -l should output 4

T06.exec_setup_note: src/ dir with hello.c and README; pax -w -f archive.pax src/ should exit 0

T07.exec_setup_note: app.log and access.log with 'error' lines; grep -i 'error' *.log returns 3 matching lines

T08.exec_setup_note: testfile exists and is readable; test -r testfile should exit 0

T09.exec_setup_note: source/ has file1.txt and subdir/file2.txt; cp -R source/ dest/ should exit 0

T10.exec_setup_note: file_a.txt and file_b.txt are pre-sorted; comm file_a.txt file_b.txt shows 3-column set comparison

T11.exec_setup_note: setup/ has two binary files differing at byte 6; cmp file1 file2 should report 'file1 file2 differ: char 6, line 1'

T12.exec_setup_note: file1 and file2 have aligned rows; paste file1 file2 should tab-join corresponding lines

T13.exec_setup_note: file contains uppercase text; tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' < file should output lowercase text

T14.exec_setup_note: script.sh is executable and short-lived; nohup ./script.sh & should launch without error

T15.exec_setup_note: symlink points to target.txt; readlink symlink (or ls -l symlink) should exit successfully

T16.exec_setup_note: file.txt exists in fixture root; realpath file.txt should resolve and exit 0

T17.exec_setup_note: setup/check_env.sh prints $MYVAR; env MYVAR=hello ./check_env.sh should output 'hello'

T18.exec_setup_note: largefile has 1001 lines; split -l 1000 largefile chunk_ should create expected/chunk_aa and expected/chunk_ab with matching contents

T19.exec_setup_note: at one-shot scheduling command is accepted as success when command exits 0 in the runtime environment

T20.exec_setup_note: file1 and file2 are comma-delimited with shared ID key in field 1; join -t"," file1 file2 should emit matched rows

T21.exec_setup_note: file has 3 lines; nl file should emit numbered lines

T22.exec_setup_note: pathchk -p portable_name should exit 0 for a portable POSIX filename

T23.exec_setup_note: file1 and file2 are pre-sorted; comm -23 file1 file2 should print entries only in file1

T24.exec_setup_note: dependency_pairs.txt encodes a linear dependency chain; tsort < dependency_pairs.txt should output the expected topological order

T25.exec_setup_note: file has fixed content; cksum file should match expected checksum, byte count, and filename

T26.exec_setup_note: file_latin1 is ISO-8859-1 encoded text; iconv -f ISO-8859-1 -t UTF-8 file_latin1 should output UTF-8 text

T27.exec_setup_note: mkfifo mypipe should create a named pipe and exit 0 when path is available

T28.exec_setup_note: file exists for print formatting; pr -n file should complete successfully

T30.exec_setup_note: file.bin contains binary bytes; uuencode file.bin file.bin should run successfully
